docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDRADE, ROMEO AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, RUBEN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
